subcodes.title: Commentary on the Fire Tablet
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath, through His sovereignty, manifested whatsoever He hath willed, and Who hath adorned this Day through its connection with His Name, as recorded in the Books of Heaven [3.5s]... ...One day during My childhood, I set out intending to visit the grandmother of the Most Great Branch at a time when she was the wife of Mirza Isma'il-i-Vazir
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر بسلطانه ما اراد و زین الیوم بنسبته الیه و سمیه فی کتب السماء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Word of God is its own standard, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
